---
title: "Interactive tools"
---

Interactive widgets from the course catalog and standalone explorations.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED TOOLS -->
### differential privacy

- **[Gaussian privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/)** — from DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)** — from DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Privacy Tradeoff Explorer](../content/tools/privacy-tradeoff-explorer/)** — standalone — Explore how noise scale and distribution shape the privacy tradeoff curve.
- **[Reconstruction 2-D slab](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-2d-slab/)** — from Reconstruction Attacks
- **[Reconstruction 3-D slabs](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)** — from Reconstruction Attacks

### hypothesis testing

- **[Gaussian privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/)** — from DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](../_generated/apps/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)** — from DP as Hypothesis Testing
- **[Privacy Tradeoff Explorer](../content/tools/privacy-tradeoff-explorer/)** — standalone — Explore how noise scale and distribution shape the privacy tradeoff curve.

### reconstruction attacks

- **[Reconstruction 2-D slab](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-2d-slab/)** — from Reconstruction Attacks
- **[Reconstruction 3-D slabs](../apps/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)** — from Reconstruction Attacks
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED TOOLS -->
